_meta.qa_pass: RE-QA #4 — Wave 3 manifest (post QA-MUST-FIX demotion + Wave 3 merge), pre-consolidation gate
_meta.author: QA / validation-gate session (independent adversarial, REVIEW-ONLY)
_meta.role: independent adversarial QA / consolidation gate; REVIEW-ONLY; no DB writes; no --allow-db-write; no mutation of the manifest, LEDGER, PROGRESS, ownership_tier, or any prior QA file
_meta.scope_guard: Chicagoland/IL only. Boston/MA parked — not investigated. Headline math FROM the census ledger with coverage; NOT anchored to ADA 14.6% or the legacy 5% entity_classification floor.
_meta.tier_model_locked: T1 true_independent (earned, never defaulted) / T2 single_loc_group / T3 dentist_multi / T4 stealth_dso / T5 branded_dso / T6 institutional / undetermined; pe_backed = orthogonal boolean. Consolidated = T2+T3+T4+T5. DSO/PE = T4+T5 only.
_meta.request_source: _QA_REVIEW_REQUEST_gate_manifest_20260621.md + the user's two RE-QA #4 messages (7 focus areas; subject-door-vs-sibling separation; SHAFI_REEM explicit-release requirement).

headline: The Wave 3 merge is structurally sound: counts reconcile exactly, 0 core-bucket collisions, all sidecars survived, the 4 prior MUST-FIX rows stayed demoted, the 87 reach3 promotions clear the AO-reach-only test, the regate field convention is applied correctly, the 22 Fleet B promotions are artifact-backed, and held protected networks did not leak. BUT three classes of issue must be cleared before --allow-db-write: (A) 4 additional subject-door closed/relocated rows still in ready; (B) the ao:SHAFI_REEM 3 rows entered ready through the generic reach3 gate without an explicit protected-network release; (C) one duplicate_denominator_blocked hazard ID (ff41419130267bd9) entered ready with a now-stale 'currently_in_candidate_set: []' claim and an unreconciled same-door tier conflict.

focus_1_mustfix_and_operating_status_swe.verdict: PASS (prior 4 hold) + MUST-FIX (4 new subject-door rows)

prior_4_mustfix_still_demoted.detail: All 4 confirmed OUT of ready_to_validate and IN needs_more_evidence; each retains preserved_ready_row + backfill_lane='operating_status_unverified' per qa_mustfix_actions (ready 210->206). No regression.

new_subject_door_closed_or_relocated_in_.principle: These are the exact same defect class as the prior 4: the row's OWN subject door (the counted watched-ZIP location) is self-flagged closed/relocated. consolidate_census.py --validate-only is a schema/DB-state gate only — it cannot detect an inactive door. They must be demoted to needs_more_evidence with preserved_ready_row + backfill_lane='operating_status_unverified', identical treatment to the prior 4.

rows.cross_check: Internally consistent with the Conen sibling ec5372dd650d17d8 (Skokie, ACTIVE), which cites THIS Chicago door as the closed one — demoting 7d1d keeps the operating Skokie door in ready.

sibling_or_legacy_closed_notes_explicitl.result: PASS — closure refers to a DIFFERENT (sibling/legacy) location used as network evidence; the subject door is operating. These correctly remain ready.

Closed door = Lombard sister. Subject operating.

Closed door = Berwyn sister. Subject operating.
Closed door = Berwyn sister. Subject operating.

Closed door = Naperville Smile Designers. Subject North Riverside not closed. Same management-entity secondary note as above.

SECONDARY NON-BLOCKING NOTE: if the Chicago door is gone, Conen is effectively single-location at Skokie — tier could be true_independent rather than dentist_multi; minor tier review for backfill, not a closure of the subject.

focus_2_reach3_durable_evidence_beyond_A.checked: All 87 reach3 ready promotions (dentist_multi 61 / branded_dso 24 / institutional 2; pe_backed 11).
focus_2_reach3_durable_evidence_beyond_A.test_applied: A row passes ONLY if it carries a durable artifact beyond AO co-occurrence reach: a shared real EIN, a documented DSO/PE/MSO parent or legal-entity, a verifiable locator/website URL, the row's own db_affiliated_dso/db_parent_company, OR a non-restated durable network narrative (brand + shared legal entity). AO reach alone = discovery signal, NOT proof.
focus_2_reach3_durable_evidence_beyond_A.result: 0 of 87 rest on AO-reach-only, even under the strict test. Confirmed exemplar artifacts: Heartland ('Dental Professionals of Illinois P.C.' + shared EIN 362736573), Familia Dental (shared legal names), Affordable Care ('Affordable Dentures & Implants' variants), Destiny/ProSmile. evidence_basis mapping honored (stealth_dso->structural; branded/dentist/single_loc->name_chain; institutional/true_independent->web_verified); all branded/dentist/stealth ready rows carry non-empty evidence_artifacts.
focus_2_reach3_durable_evidence_beyond_A.note: AO reach correctly treated throughout as a SIGNAL, never as the sole basis.

focus_3_reach3_regate_field_convention.convention: reach3 regate_audit uses candidate_tier / gate_status as THE CORRECTED VALUES directly (NOT final_tier/final_gate as reach4 does). The gate honored these as overrides.

spot_checks.name: REEM SHAFI
spot_checks.result: CORRECT — candidate_tier read as the corrected value. (See focus_6 for the orthogonal SHAFI_REEM release defect — that is a network-release-policy issue, not a regate-convention issue.)

focus_3_reach3_regate_field_convention.guard_check: ao_network_evidence_reach3_ranked_qa.json validation_guards PASS:true, networks_ok 51/51, ready_for_validation_uncorroborated [], gate_ceiling_violations_final_leak []; gate_ceiling = 'ready_for_validation' (never 'final').

focus_4_fleet_b_wave3_artifact_backing.verdict: PASS (substantive) with one denominator-hazard MUST-FIX surfaced (see focus_6 / item C)
focus_4_fleet_b_wave3_artifact_backing.promotions: 22 = local_clusters 15 + website_clusters 5 + structural_residue 2 (of 19/5/2 concrete-tier classified; 4 local dups; 618+74+2 needs_verification correctly held as sidecar LEADS).

backing_confirmed.local_clusters_15: Each on parent_company == a known DSO (e.g. ADMI/Aspen, SONRAVA/Western Dental) OR a shared real EIN cluster — NOT brand-substring. Example: ein-015 (EIN 362686478) spans 2 ZIPs (ff41419130267bd9 + 5c5fb8dccc842460), legal 'GENERAL DENTISTRY', no DSO/MSO -> correctly dentist_multi.
backing_confirmed.website_clusters_5: 2 dentist_multi (own-domain backed); 3 branded_dso (Dental Dreams, Family Dental Care, Destiny/ProSmile [row d300597c91e8d789, domain destinydentalcare.com]) where the office's OWN listed website domain == the known-DSO brand's corporate site + matching name token. This is stronger than a substring match (it is the door's own domain resolving to the brand corporate site). pe_backed set only where the brand is documented PE-backed (ProSmile). MINOR DATA-QUALITY NOTE (non-blocking): d300597c91e8d789 name token is garbled 'DENTINY' vs 'DESTINY' — the domain carries the real signal, classification stands.
backing_confirmed.structural_residue_2: Both HABBAL (Walid Habbal DDS) — 2 Palos-area offices (60441, 60463), shared phone 708-361-8117, EIN 471340456 -> dentist_multi. Two distinct doors, one dentist; correctly T3 (dentist-owned multi), NOT a DSO tier. shared-surname+shared-phone across 2 ZIPs is acceptable for a dentist_multi (non-DSO) verdict; the 'brand-substring/co-location' concern applies to DSO-tier promotions, which this is not.

focus_4_fleet_b_wave3_artifact_backing.qa_flag_honoring: PASS — Pieta 1db785090b4b1093 (da_synthetic_npi) correctly held in backfill, NOT ready. website_clusters + structural_residue carried no qa_flags.

focus_5_dedup_overlap_counts.detail: ready 315 distinct location_ids (0 duplicates); core buckets mutually exclusive (ready / needs_more / rejected / conflicts) — 0 collisions. 558 distinct core-universe locations. The 3 known overlaps_with_prior_waves (9c588fbf68114847 JIANJUN HAO, addadba0d25e3812 SINAN RAZZAK, 0c8f995db2124f57 MOHAMMED SALIH) were caught in the 33 reach3 dups. Ready tier mix: dentist_multi 151 / branded_dso 96 / true_independent 30 / stealth_dso 21 / institutional 10 / single_loc_group 7. Basis mix: name_chain 169 / web_verified 81 / intel_dossier 25 / locator 19 / ein_cluster 11 / structural 7 / ao_cluster 3.
focus_5_dedup_overlap_counts.caveat: location_id-level dedup is exact (0 collisions). It does NOT catch same-PHYSICAL-door duplicates that carry different location_ids — see focus_6 item C (ff41419130267bd9 vs f94fb29cc7d444cd share phone (773) 528-2205).

focus_6_sidecars_and_held_networks.verdict: PASS (sidecars + held networks) + MUST-FIX (ao:SHAFI_REEM release) + MUST-FIX (duplicate_denominator_blocked reconcile)

sidecars_survived.detail: All Wave 1 / Wave 2 / Wave 3 strategic-network and Fleet B lead sidecars preserved verbatim; 694 needs_verification Fleet B rows retained as future-app LEADS, not promoted.

held_protected_networks_did_not_leak.AQEL_in_ready: 0 (Brite Dental / Fadi Aqel held in conflicts as CONTESTED)
held_protected_networks_did_not_leak.detail: Held networks (Sweis, Ramaha, Aqel, Belkic) did not enter ready. Webster Dental contested set (19 rows incl. WEBSTER DENTAL CARE CICERO/EVANSTON/SCHAUMBURG/NORTH SUBURBAN, Berwyn Family Dental, Klyber Dental, Brite/Aqel) correctly held in conflicts pending main-session adjudication.

released_protected_networks_documented.detail: ao_network_release_decisions records explicit, policy-gated releases: SHAFI_SOHAIL (15 rows in ready), BRUNETTI_ROBERT (8), LABINOV_BORIS (7), NITTINGER_RACHEL (released, 0 currently in ready). Policy: release only when network-level evidence_quality=='verified'. SWEIS_JUBRAIL and RAMAHA_AHMED correctly held.

shafi_reem_release_defect.identity: Two Rivers Dental — Dr. Reem Shafi; a dentist-owned network operating ~20+ Chicagoland locations under distinct local trade names (Hanover / Baker Hill / Simply / Two Rivers / Absolute). Surname SHAFI is on the protected-network do-not-release-without-main-session-release list.
shafi_reem_release_defect.defect: These 3 rows entered ready through the GENERIC reach3 per-row gate. ao:SHAFI_REEM is NOT a key in ao_network_release_decisions.decisions and is NOT in released_networks (only ao:SHAFI_SOHAIL is). It therefore bypassed the protected-network release policy as an implicit protected-surname release — exactly what the user prohibited.
shafi_reem_release_defect.secondary_note: Tier inconsistency: the network is described as a branded DSO under local trade names (-> branded_dso, T5), yet 6da55130228a9c54 was regated to dentist_multi for 'no MSO/management/platform/DSO-brand evidence'. A ~20-location single-owner network under multiple distinct trade names is itself a brand/management structure; the dentist_multi regate may understate it. Resolve tier alongside the release decision (do NOT use pe_backed=false to justify the branded_dso->dentist_multi downgrade).
shafi_reem_release_defect.required_resolution: EITHER (a) the Gate Owner adds an explicit ao:SHAFI_REEM release decision to ao_network_release_decisions with network-level evidence_quality and a release rationale (treating it as the Reem Shafi / Two Rivers arm of the SHAFI family already released under SHAFI_SOHAIL), OR (b) a clear documented note that ao:SHAFI_REEM is covered by the prior Shafi/Two Rivers release logic. Until one exists, hold the 3 rows out of ready (needs_more_evidence). It must NOT remain an implicit protected-surname/network release.

duplicate_denominator_blocked_reconcile.detail: ff41419130267bd9 (Peters, Erika; Fleet B ein-015, EIN 362686478) is one of the 16 location_ids in buckets.duplicate_denominator_blocked. It is now in ready (dentist_multi, confidence medium), but duplicate_denominator_blocked.currently_in_candidate_set is still [] — that claim is now STALE. It shares phone (773) 528-2205 (the SAME physical door) with f94fb29cc7d444cd (CHICAGO DENTAL PROFESSIONALS INC), whose ddb tier is true_independent and which is in NO live bucket. The same physical door therefore carries a conflicting consolidation verdict (independent vs consolidated) that has not been reconciled.
duplicate_denominator_blocked_reconcile.why_focus_5_did_not_catch_it: location_id-level dedup is exact (0 collisions), but ff41419130267bd9 and f94fb29cc7d444cd are DIFFERENT location_ids at the SAME phone/door (2340 N Clybourn Ave, 773-528-2205) — a same-door duplicate that id-dedup cannot see.
duplicate_denominator_blocked_reconcile.gate_owner_confirmation: Gate Owner confirmed 2026-06-21 that ff41419130267bd9 is a real current ready-row leak from duplicate_denominator_blocked and prescribed the gate action below. The DDB note explicitly requires future waves to resolve these addresses BEFORE consolidating; this wave did not.
duplicate_denominator_blocked_reconcile.required_resolution: DEMOTE ff41419130267bd9 ready_to_validate -> needs_more_evidence; preserve the original row under preserved_ready_row; backfill_lane='duplicate_door_tier_conflict'; AND update duplicate_denominator_blocked.currently_in_candidate_set to reflect the leak/fix (was stale []). When the door is later reconciled, confirm which row is canonical (Peters dentist_multi vs CHICAGO DENTAL PROFESSIONALS INC true_independent) so the door is counted once with one tier.
duplicate_denominator_blocked_reconcile.other_15_ddb_ids: Confirmed NOT in any live bucket — no leak from the remaining 15.

A_operating_status_demotions.action: demote ready_to_validate -> needs_more_evidence; keep preserved_ready_row + backfill_lane='operating_status_unverified' (identical to the prior 4)

B_shafi_reem_release.action: add explicit ao:SHAFI_REEM release/adjudication to ao_network_release_decisions OR a documented 'covered by prior Shafi/Two Rivers release' note; else hold the 3 rows out of ready. Resolve tier (branded_dso vs dentist_multi) at the same time; do not downgrade on pe_backed=false alone.

C_duplicate_door_tier_conflict.action: DEMOTE ready_to_validate -> needs_more_evidence; preserve original row under preserved_ready_row; backfill_lane='duplicate_door_tier_conflict'; AND update duplicate_denominator_blocked.currently_in_candidate_set to reflect the leak/fix (was stale []). Gate-Owner-confirmed 2026-06-21 as a real ready-row leak.
C_duplicate_door_tier_conflict.primary_detail: Peters, Erika / 2340 N Clybourn Ave / phone 773-528-2205 / currently ready as dentist_multi (Fleet B ein-015, EIN 362686478).
C_duplicate_door_tier_conflict.twin_detail: CHICAGO DENTAL PROFESSIONALS INC / 2340 N Clybourn / same phone 773-528-2205 / prior true_independent — conflicting same-door verdict; in NO live bucket.
C_duplicate_door_tier_conflict.rationale: DDB note requires resolving these addresses before consolidating; the door currently carries both consolidated (dentist_multi) and independent (true_independent) verdicts. Hold until reconciled.

pass_summary.focus_4_fleet_b_artifact_backing: PASS (substantive); 1 duplicate-door leak surfaced -> item C (Gate-Owner-confirmed)
pass_summary.focus_5_dedup_counts: PASS exact at location_id level (315/162/74/7; 558 distinct; 0 collisions) — BUT one same-physical-door duplicate (ff41419130267bd9 vs f94fb29cc7d444cd) escapes id-dedup -> item C
pass_summary.focus_6_held_networks_no_leak: PASS (Sweis/Ramaha/Aqel/Belkic 0 in ready; Webster set held in conflicts)

post_fix_projection.note: Illustrative only — the Gate Owner owns the mutation. A (4) and C (1) are demotions; B (3) is a demotion ONLY if not released. C is now a confirmed demotion (not a net-zero reconcile).
post_fix_projection.breakdown: 315 - 4 (A) - 1 (C) = 310 if SHAFI_REEM released by explicit Gate Owner decision; minus a further 3 (B) = 307 if SHAFI_REEM held.

consolidate_authorization.reason: consolidate_census.py --allow-db-write is NOT authorized until the user explicitly says 'consolidate approved manifest'. consolidation_status remains FROZEN. This RE-QA pass is review-only and clears the schema/structure of the Wave 3 merge subject to the 3 MUST-FIX classes above; it is not a consolidate trigger.
consolidate_authorization.recommended_path: Per the Gate Owner's decision menu: take path (b) — apply MUST-FIX A (demote 4), resolve MUST-FIX B (explicit SHAFI_REEM release decision or hold), reconcile MUST-FIX C (ddb same-door), re-run --validate-only, then return for sign-off. The 74 conflicts (incl. Webster set) and 87 backfill remain available to work but are NOT blockers to the 315-row gate beyond the 3 MUST-FIX items.
consolidate_authorization.validator_note: Structural pre-flight command is: python3 scrapers/consolidate_census.py <ready_file> --session <id> --validate-only (NEVER --allow-db-write). It gates SCHEMA/DB-state only; it does NOT re-judge evidence or operating status — which is precisely why MUST-FIX A (closed-door) cannot be caught by the validator and must be handled at the gate.
